ksa_text: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-006 (RM, Skill) excluded on seniority grounds. Text contains executive-level content not aligned with IC-to-senior-IC ANL scope. Composite 0.4969. Framework signals: nist_ai_rmf=0.497, eu_ai_act=0.457, ddat=0.436. ANL roles in scope are individual contributors through senior ICs; organizational or C-suite-level responsibilities fall outside this band.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Seniority concerns confirmed. Score 0.4969 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-S-006 (composite 0.4969) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.4969 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.4969 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4969, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
